children.heading: .—Contract Authority
children.label: a .—Contract Authority
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may enter into contracts with commercial entities that desire to conduct commercial test and evaluation activities at a Major Range and Test Facility Installation.

children.heading: .—Termination or Limitation of Contract Under Certain Circumstances
children.label: b .—Termination or Limitation of Contract Under Certain Circumstances

children.text: to the public health and safety;
to property (either public or private); or
to any national security interest or foreign policy interest of the United States.

children.heading: .—Contract Price
children.label: c .—Contract Price
children.text: A contract entered into under subsection (a) shall include a provision that requires a commercial entity using a Major Range and Test Facility Installation under the contract to reimburse the Department of Defense for all direct costs to the United States that are associated with the test and evaluation activities conducted by the commercial entity under the contract. In addition, the contract may include a provision that requires the commercial entity to reimburse the Department of Defense for such indirect costs related to the use of the installation as the Secretary of Defense considers to be appropriate. The Secretary may delegate to the commander of the Major Range and Test Facility Installation the authority to determine the appropriateness of the amount of indirect costs included in such a contract provision.

children.heading: .—Retention of Funds Collected From Commercial Users
children.label: d .—Retention of Funds Collected From Commercial Users
children.text: Amounts collected under subsection (c) from a commercial entity conducting test and evaluation activities at a Major Range and Test Facility Installation shall be credited to the appropriation accounts under which the costs associated with the test and evaluation activities of the commercial entity were incurred.

children.heading: .—Regulations and Limitations
children.label: e .—Regulations and Limitations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations to carry out this section.

The term “Major Range and Test Facility Installation” means a test and evaluation installation under the jurisdiction of the Department of Defense and designated as a Major Range and Test Facility Installation by the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: labor, material, facilities, utilities, equipment, supplies, and any other resources damaged or consumed during test or evaluation activities or maintained for a particular commercial entity; and

children.label: B
children.text: construction specifically performed for a commercial entity to conduct test and evaluation activities.
